summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS iteration 12 features: printer subnet auto-detection and email integration. All 15 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Email service correctly returns 'skipped' status when RESEND_API_KEY not configured.
critical_code_review_comments: Printer subnet auto-detection (GET /api/printers/detect-subnet) working correctly - returns server's actual network subnet
Email integration gracefully handles missing RESEND_API_KEY - all email endpoints return status='skipped' without errors
Subscriptions page correctly shows 'Email not configured' banner with data-testid='email-not-configured'
Platform Settings page has Email Service section showing configuration status
All login flows work correctly: platform_owner -> /platform/dashboard, restaurant_admin -> /dashboard, staff -> /pos
POS screen loads with products after staff login
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features verified: 1) Printer subnet auto-detection now uses backend's actual network instead of hardcoded 192.168.1. 2) Email integration (Resend) for platform owners - welcome emails, trial reminders, payment reminders all return 'skipped' status gracefully when RESEND_API_KEY not configured. UI shows appropriate banners and toast notifications. All 3 user login flows work correctly with proper redirects.

frontend_tests.trial_reminder_button: PASSED - 'Send Trial Reminder' button visible and clickable
frontend_tests.email_button_on_notifications: PASSED - 'Email' buttons visible on pending notifications
frontend_tests.toast_shows_skipped_message: PASSED - toast shows 'Email service not configured' message
frontend_tests.platform_settings_email_section: PASSED - Email Service section visible with 'not configured' status
frontend_tests.pos_screen_loads_with_products: PASSED - 12 products visible on POS screen

mocked_apis.email_service: Email sending via Resend is MOCKED - returns 'skipped' status when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
